Well, not many fighting games that one sees an accurate emphasis of FMA. So props for the originality. After having actually played the game through, and unlocked a 3rd character, I'm very impressed by this game, it's like a Filipino folklore version of the old arcade game of Killer Instinct. Well done to the developers on this. However, I don't like how the app auto-updates, despite me having that function disabled on my phone, hence the one star reduction in my rating.

Una kong nakita tong game na to, ang interesting. Noong sinubukan ko na, ang ganda: Yung graphics, yung gameplay, yung mechanics, yung characters, as in lahat. Ang gusto ko lang i-mungkahi is dagdagan pa ng mga iconic Philippine Mythical Creatures. (Translation: "When I saw this at first, it was interesting. When I tried it, it was great: the graphics, the gameplay, the mechanics, the characters, as in all of it. I just want to suggest adding more iconic Philippine Mythical Creatures.)

This is one of the better fighting games in mobile, it has an easy to play yet hard to master controls. The reason I'm rating this 3 stars is the modes are sparse and fighting the bosses that are not "evil shen long" feel like a chore because the meter system rewards offense but not being hit. Fighting shen long is fun because the player can still make a comeback since the meter builds up when Shen Long hits the player. I get it's a kusoge but good kusoges allow wild things, not just one-sided.

Coming back after years of playing various fighting games, this game is riddled with terrible design choices that makes it bad to play. First off, the difficulty is a total joke. You don't have to tell people who are into fighting games that some characters resemble other fg characters, even down to their movesets.

Really solid and fun mobile fighter. Fills a void Metal Revolution left. I do have a few issues though. Directional inputs are a bit messy, requiring you to tap and press special. It sometimes works but other times it'll eat the directional and just do neutral. Theres a decent roster size but most of it is blocked behind ads that you have to pay extra to remove, even if you were to pay for the dlc. I think it needs more refinement but its a good time killer. More options in training mode!

This game is definetly peak beginner fighting game. Traditional hardcore mechanics, but without the barrier of entry of motion inputs make a game that helps you on your fighting game journey, but doesnt treat you like a baby. Even as someone whos into more advanced fighting games, this game has alot to offer. My only gripes are grabs not being able to be performed mid combo (A grab finisher to a combo would be really fun) some overlapping sound effects being really jarring. Otherwise solid game!

The game didn't do auto rotate and nothing also happens when you turn on auto rotate on your phone, and it's hard to play when the earphone is plugged in to my phone (redmi note 8 pro) i hope you can add that reverse landscape.

Great fighting game. Been looking for for this kind of game on mobile. Been having a blast in training mode with combos and all. I see all the references from different fighting game titles (I see you kung fu man) and I'm not complaining as they're all great and unique in their own. And just my suggestions: Special Moves could be used when holding the forward or back button and not only tap + S. Stand chain attacks should also convert to crouching. Online would be great but I know it's not easy.
It was great, very addictive.. If you could add more characters and stages would be much better. For a soft launch, this is great.
Great game i love it

Each character has their own distinct style that makes them unique. I definitely found myself immersed in finding whats the best combo to use against the CPU. If I had to add on to make the game better it would be to enhance training mode and provide defensive options that would aid in learning how each character work and also add a command list. Otherwise this is a very well made game. Great job to the devs for putting their heart and soul to the game.

I'm really excited for the next update. It's really good game and controls are nice. I'm having fun especially with Akira it's like Kakashi, Megakid SS is OP 😍 and Millions's Limbo is awesome yet irritating when he's your opponent 🤣 great job Devs 💪
This game has been a phenomenal experience and is a great fighting on mobile that pays homage to many classic fighting games I look forward to seeing how it continues to grow.
Maganda sana kaso walang originality yung characters yung voicelines at acting di pulido. Laki ng potential kung ppuliduhin lang. Add some local multi-player too.

The Game so far is the most accesible Fighting game on Mobile in my experience. The Movesets are simple but effective balanced for players unfamiliar with fighting games against professional players of the genre. So far I think there still lack content from this game but hey, it's still new. My only suggestion for this game to improve the experience is if only I could play with someone over LAN or Hotspot just anything that can make you enjoy the game with someone since that's almost beneficial.

One of the best fighting games for the mobile right now!! The gameplay is a mixture of Blazblue, MVC, SF and KOF. If you like those games, then this is the perfect mobile fighting game for you. Kudos to the Devs who made this and hope you will find great success in this game and the bayani fighting game. Keep up the good work!!!

Gotta say this game is very well made comparing to other fighting game on mobile,its easy to play and have cool graphics,maybe you guys can add a color system for each character for the game to be more enjoyable

Game's really fun, realized some references from other games, pretty fun for a mobile fighting game. It has depth and complexity and it's really fun. Control is kinda wacky sometimes but i'm waiting for updates.

curiosity got me when i bump into facebook ad game is good game style lalo at may combo at fimisher is a++++ more room for improvement sana lang ung graphics may option to lower down and medyo nag lag ung interface ng buttons good.ung gameplay kahit naka bluetooth headphone meat titan is no joke keep it up
Ang Ganda Ng gameplay at Ng control 10/10 solid game👌 PS Sana nagkaroon din to sa pc
Unexpected great fighting game in a mobile phone 👏👏
I've been following the game for a little while and im so glad that its finally on mobile! Will there be a beta program for it later on?
I'm very surprised I enjoy this alot but the only problem i had is the damage because some characters really poor at dealing damage and there's shawn who can almost kill you in one combo.
Very fun and addicting game play, with a hugh cast with very diverse roster. Can't wait for more updates and hopefully it come to pc

So far enjoyable. Characters are different enough to not feel like a wasted roster spot. Config many makes me think there's a PC version,this is a game worth the time you would waste on mobile gaming. Looking forward to seeing what new characters get added. This game is essentially trying to dethrone Smash as Guest Fighters the Game in the best way possible without being overly simplified like arena fighter style that Smash is. Its roots of gameplay mechanics lie w/ the characters chosen herein.

Cool game, been tryna look for a fighting game that is not completely dead, since this is relatively new I will stay. I'm surprised I can do combos, since most mobile fighting games need perfectly precise and timed combos. Also I just made up a combo and It worked. It doesn't overflow you with moves either. You have neutral, air, and low attacks(as far as I know).

Actually playable, runs good, fun combos, despite being the first time I've ever played, somehow immediately felt as though I've known the characters for ages, the true mark of a classic for sure Didn't see a single ad The bottom line of attack buttons line up to spell out sex 10/10

Highly, HIGHLY recommend to any fan of fighting games. Im hugely passionate about fighting games and this is the best one I've ever played on mobile. More characters than I was expecting, smooth gameplay, controls about as well as you can hope for on touch screen. Way more fleshed out than I was expecting, with air dashes, super moves, air and ground combos, this is a game I wouldn't be disappointed in buying on PC much less getting it for free on my phone. Big props the the devs.
